title: Mojito's Modpack
description: Mojito's vanilla++ modpack: QOL and lightweight changes, fun for the whole family.
body:
# Mojito's Modpack

I started a family Minecraft server to play with my kids, and quickly got into installing mods to tailor the experience for our family. As the number of mods and computers grew, I decided to create a modpack to make it easier to install and update the mods. This makes it easier to keep everyone on the same version of everything, as well as to add new mods or update existing ones.

I would classify it as a vanilla++ modpack, as it doesn't stray too far from the vanilla experience. It adds a lot of quality of life improvements, and a few new features, but doesn't change the core gameplay too much. It's definitely not an overhaul modpack.

While it was created for personal use, I've spent a lot of time curating the mods and I'm happy to share it with others. You can play it as-is, or use it for inspiration.

### Features

- Performance / optimization mods
- Improved world generation, including terrain, structures, ruins, etc
- Map and minimap
- Waystones
- A variety of quality-of-life mods
- Farmer's Delight and friends for additional farming, cooking
